vocab.meaning: một cái tên quen thuộc với mọi nhà
vocab.example: E-commerce sites like Shopee have become a household name in my country, with almost everyone using them for daily shopping.

vocab.meaning: cực kỳ phổ biến, tạo nên cơn sốt
vocab.example: Short-video platforms are currently all the rage among teenagers, who spend hours scrolling through viral content.

vocab.meaning: nguồn sống, thứ thiết yếu hàng ngày
vocab.example: For many freelancers here, professional networking sites are their bread and butter for finding new clients.

vocab.word: at the push of a button
vocab.meaning: vô cùng nhanh chóng và dễ dàng (chỉ bằng một nút bấm)
vocab.example: Food delivery websites allow you to have a hot meal at your doorstep at the push of a button.

vocab.meaning: một sự dồi dào, rất nhiều (kiến thức/thông tin)
vocab.example: Educational websites provide a wealth of information for students who want to study for international exams like IELTS.

vocab.meaning: theo dõi, cập nhật thông tin
vocab.example: News portals are popular because they help people keep track of the latest economic shifts in real time.

vocab.word: have the world at one's fingertips
vocab.meaning: có cả thế giới trong tầm tay (tiếp cận thông tin dễ dàng)
vocab.example: With high-speed search engines, internet users in my country feel like they have the world at their fingertips.

vocab.meaning: lan truyền nhanh chóng trên mạng
vocab.example: Social media sites are the go-to place for any news or trends that have the potential to go viral overnight.
Booking websites are favored because they cut out the middleman, allowing travelers to deal directly with hotels.

vocab.meaning: lựa chọn đầu tiên, nơi ưu tiên tìm đến
vocab.example: YouTube is the go-to website for anyone looking for visual tutorials on DIY projects or cooking.
